_instructions: Selected public case studies. Links point to the source repository or a published report when available.
subtitle: Supply chain and business analytics work

projects.title: Supply Chain Service-Level Dashboard
projects.description: Power BI case study for monitoring on-time, in-full, and line-fill service levels in an FMCG distribution context.
projects.longDescription: Analyzes customer, product, order, and target data to support supply chain service-level reporting for the AtliQ Mart case study.

projects.title: Retail Data Analytics
projects.description: Retail analytics workflow that uses the Kaggle API, Pandas, and SQL Server for data preparation and analysis.
projects.longDescription: Public project integrating Python-based extraction and transformation with SQL Server analysis for retail data.

projects.title: Customer Trends Analysis
projects.description: Customer-trend analysis project using SQL, Python, and Power BI.
projects.longDescription: Public analytics project that brings together SQL, Python, and Power BI to examine customer trends.

projects.title: Sales Insights Dashboard
projects.description: Sales-insights project using SQL ETL, a star-schema data model, and Tableau reporting.
projects.longDescription: Public business-intelligence project that prepares sales data in SQL and presents it through Tableau dashboards.

projects.title: Sales Dashboard
projects.description: Browser-based sales-dashboard project published as a public repository.
projects.longDescription: Public JavaScript, HTML, and CSS project for presenting sales data in a dashboard format.
